tickets.title: Bootstrap environment and confirm scaffold readiness
tickets.summary: Confirm runtime and toolchain prerequisites, install project and test dependencies, verify validation commands can run in this environment, and replace scaffold placeholders before deeper implementation work begins.
acceptance: Runtime and required toolchain executables are present or the gap is explicitly reported
Project dependencies are installed using repo-appropriate Ubuntu-safe commands
Test dependencies are installed using repo-appropriate Ubuntu-safe commands
Canonical validation commands are identified and can be executed from the repo root
Canonical brief updated with real project content
Team entrypoints and ticket tools verified
